There's a +1 in 'Verified' and +2 in 'Code-Review', but this doesn't seem merged. I'm not sure what's going on.

Patch Set 3: Code-Review+1

Well, that's because merging is a separate action from approval and is not automatic. :)

(Also, though only he knows for sure, if Andreas +2s something and doesn't immediately merge it, it can mean he hit the wrong button...)

Patch Set 3: Code-Review+1

Patrick is right - I shouldn't have set +2 on this patch.

Oleg lands patches from master-next once or twice a week, depending on how the testing is going.

commit.message:
